zh.Buckhurst by Withyham, Sussex, England: 英國英格蘭素可巴可爾斯特 白 維提哈姆
zh.Buckhurst, Sussex, England: 英國英格蘭素可巴可爾斯特 白 維提哈姆
zh.lifeSummary: 當Jordan de Sakeville於大約1230年出生在英國英格蘭素可巴可爾斯特 白 維提哈姆時，他的父親Jordan Saukeville62歲，母親Maud Normanvil59歲。他於1253年之前與Margery Aguillon結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世於1273年3月21日在他的家鄉享年44歲。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Jordan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a name given to a child of either sex baptized in holy water that was, purportedly at least, brought from the River Jordan, whose Hebrew name, ha-yarden, means ‘flowing down’. It was in this river that Christ was baptized by John the Baptist, and medieval pilgrims to the Holy Land usually tried to bring back a flask of its water with them. The modern given name is either a revival of this, or else a transferred use of the surname that was derived from the medieval given name. It is more popular as a boy's name in Britain and as a girl's name in the United States.

en.lifeSummary: When Jordan de Sakeville was born about 1230, in Buckhurst by Withyham, Sussex, England, United Kingdom, his father, Jordan Saukeville, was 62 and his mother, Maud Normanvil, was 59. He married Margery Aguillon before 1253. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died on 21 March 1273, in his hometown, at the age of 44.

Il a épousé Margery Aguillon avant 1253. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé le 21 mars 1273, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 44 ans.

ko.lifeSummary: Jordan de Sakeville(이)가 대략 1230년 영국 잉글랜드 수세스 벅후르스트 비 위스이함에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Jordan Saukeville(은)는 62세였고, 그의 어머니 Maud Normanvil(은)는 59세였다. 그는 1253년 이전 Margery Aguillon(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1273년 3월 21일 그의 고향에서 44세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Jordan de Sakeville родился около 1230 г. в местности буккхурст би витихам, суссекс, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Jordan Saukeville было 62 года, а матери, которую звали Maud Normanvil, 59. Он женился на женщине по имени Margery Aguillon перед 1253 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер 21 марта 1273 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 44 лет.
